positive: A whimsical, kawaii-style illustration of a sleepy fox curled up next to a steaming cup of tea and a pile of oversized mushrooms. Cute, gentle, storybook aesthetic, soft pastel color palette (lavender, peach, mint), highly detailed linework, character design, Pixar quality.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, violent, overly complex, dark colors
